headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich eased past Mainz 3-0 on Saturday but had to put title celebrations on ice after Bayer Leverkusen matched their win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern title celebrations on hold despite 3-0 win

video.headline: Eric Dier slots in the goal for Bayern Munich

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Eric Dier slots in the goal for Bayern Munich) 2025/04/26 ESHEET

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund conceded a stoppage-time equaliser but still managed to score a last-gasp winner for a 3-2 win at Hoffenheim on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund grab late winner to boost UCL chances

video.headline: Waldemar Anton wins it late for Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Waldemar Anton wins it late for Dortmund) 2025/04/26 ESHEET
